prompt:
Use case: process proof beat
Primary request: Visualize a disciplined five-step engagement model as a circuit-like operating system. Elegant, credible, no people, no logos.
Scene/background: dark technical board with glowing off-white nodes connected by burnt orange pathways
Subject: fit, diagnose, design, stabilize, exit
Action: beat 1 (0-1s) node 0 lights; beat 2 (1-3s) nodes illuminate in sequence along the path; beat 3 (3-4s) the full flow glows steadily
Camera: top-down locked-off shot with subtle push-in
Lighting/mood: precise, engineered, credible
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange
Style/format: elegant systems diagram animation
Audio: sequential ticks synced to node activation
Text (verbatim): "FIT. DIAGNOSE. DESIGN. STABILIZE. EXIT."
Constraints: keep diagram simple and readable; no fake metrics; no logos
Avoid: dense UI, tiny labels, neon cyberpunk styling
